---
title: "cognitive_router.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\cognitive_router.py"
loc: 160
complexity: 25
logic_score: 3.10
style_score: 3.50
intel_score: 3.40
overall_score: 1.53
---

## Intent
The `cognitive_router.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on CognitiveRouter, __init__, _secure_execute, route_intent, _evaluate_safety, _translate_intent, _dispatch_wild_hunt, _acquire_targets, _execute_forge, _run_learning_session. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CognitiveRouter, __init__, _secure_execute, route_intent, _evaluate_safety, _translate_intent, _dispatch_wild_hunt, _acquire_targets, _execute_forge, _run_learning_session. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)
- [src.core.engine.heimdall_shield](file://src.core.engine.heimdall_shield)
- [src.core.lease_manager](file://src.core.lease_manager)

### Exports
- `CognitiveRouter`
- `__init__`
- `_secure_execute`
- `route_intent`
- `_evaluate_safety`
- `_translate_intent`
- `_dispatch_wild_hunt`
- `_acquire_targets`
- `_execute_forge`
- `_run_learning_session`
